input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8856 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is caused by a Jetty 9.4 WebAppClassLoader.Context API change: isSystemClass/isServerClass now take Class<?> and the interface also requires isServerResource(String, URL) and isSystemResource(String, URL). This is a test-source compatibility fix, not setup.

Optional Jetty features such as JSP, JMX, annotations, JNDI, or deployment-manager scenarios may require additional Jetty modules, but they are not required for baseline meaningful coverage of jetty-webapp itself.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-webapp:9.4.0.RC1 is self-contained for meaningful embedded WebAppContext/WebAppClassLoader coverage through its normal transitive Jetty and javax.servlet dependencies; no extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is concretely required.
